full_text:
He Luan 和鸞
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
He Luan (和鸞)was born in Zhangye. Local warlord of Zhangye, defeated Yan Jun but was killed by Wang Bi. He Luan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
